overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game depicting two characters riding a horse through a post-apocalyptic urban landscape. They traverse overgrown grass fields, cross a shallow concrete stream, and ride past collapsed skyscrapers in a reclaimed city center with lush summer vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban park with concrete ruins approaching stream

events.description: approaching the edge of a concrete drainage channel with shallow water

agents.ego_description: riding horse through tall grass toward a concrete stream bed with abandoned city buildings visible in the background

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway overpass spanning the path ahead
tall damaged glass and steel skyscraper with broken windows
tall concrete office tower with weathered facade
tall evergreen tree with dense foliage
overgrown tall green grass covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following two riders on a brown horse through a field of tall green grass. In the distance, abandoned skyscrapers rise against a partly cloudy sky, while a concrete overpass bridge looms ahead. The camera moves steadily forward through the dense vegetation toward a concrete drainage channel.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage channel with shallow flowing water

events.description: horse steps into the shallow water of the concrete channel
horse climbs out of the stream onto the grassy bank

agents.ego_description: carefully guiding horse through the shallow water between high concrete channel walls

entered.detail: vertical concrete wall of the drainage channel
vertical concrete wall of the drainage channel
shallow clear water flowing over the concrete channel bed

segments.scene_description: The horse enters a narrow concrete drainage channel filled with shallow water, moving between high concrete walls. The overpass bridge passes overhead as the camera follows the riders through the water. The environment is more enclosed with limited sky visibility compared to the open field.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with collapsed modern ruins and standing skyscrapers

events.description: passing large collapsed tilted building structure on the right

agents.ego_description: riding horse up a grassy slope navigating around ruins of collapsed buildings and damaged skyscrapers

entered.detail: steep grassy bank leading upward from the stream
massively tilted and collapsed modern building with exposed floors and structural beams
small wooden roofed structure in the grass
green leafy tree with broad canopy

segments.scene_description: Exiting the water, the horse climbs a grassy slope into an area with massive structural ruins. A dramatically collapsed skyscraper leans against another building on the right, while the camera continues forward through the overgrown urban terrain with damaged high-rises towering overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, overgrown field into the claustrophobic confines of a concrete channel before emerging into a landscape of colossal urban ruins. It begins by trailing two riders on a brown horse through tall green grass, moving steadily toward a looming concrete overpass under a partly cloudy sky. As the horse enters a narrow drainage channel, the environment shifts from open terrain to an enclosed space of high concrete walls and shallow water. The scene then opens up as the riders climb a grassy slope, leaving the water behind to enter a reclaimed city center. Finally, the camera pushes forward through the overgrown urban terrain, passing beneath towering high-rises and a dramatically collapsed skyscraper leaning against its neighbor.
